title: Verbio Recognizer Options
description: Verbio-specific STT options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'verbio'.

inline_grammar.description: Inline SRGS grammar for constrained recognition.

grammar_uri.description: URI of an external grammar resource.

speech_complete_timeout.description: Silence duration in seconds after complete speech.

speech_incomplete_timeout.description: Silence duration in seconds after incomplete speech.
